name: pr_cep_winexp_align
drl:
rule Rw when accumulate( E() over window:time(1000ms); $c : count() ) then end
rule Rb when $x : E() then end
_finding: window_time(N) vs expires_ms(N) at age EXACTLY N, in one scenario (external review round 23): the window is STRICT (the event leaves the window at age == N - the pr_cep_win_x_bare_100 boundary, so Rw re-fires with count 0) while expiry is INCLUSIVE (the event is alive AT its deadline - the pr_cep_expwin_atlo boundary, so it survives in finals). The one-instant misalignment for window_time(N) == expires_ms(N) is faithful Drools, certified from both arcs; this cell makes it observable in a single run.
